title: Sweet And Light Middle Eastern Courgettes Stir-fry
description: A delightful twist on a classic stir fry featuring crispy courgettes infused with sweet and aromatic spices, perfect for a light and refreshing meal.

ingredients.name: Sweetener of your choice (e.g., honey, maple syrup)

instructions: Chop the courgettes into bite-sized pieces and thinly slice the onion.
Finely chop the garlic cloves. If using, lightly toast the cumin seeds in a dry pan for a few seconds until fragrant.
Heat olive oil in a wok or large frying pan over medium-high heat. Add the sliced onions and cook till they begin to soften, about 2 minutes.
Add thinly sliced courgettes along with red pepper flakes (if using). Stir fry for 3-5 minutes until they start to become translucent.
Stir in finely chopped garlic and cumin seeds into the pan. Cook for another minute or two until fragrant.
Drizzle in the sweetener of your choice and stir well. Continue cooking, stirring frequently, until most of the liquid has evaporated and the courgettes are slightly crispy on the outside.
Remove from heat immediately to prevent burning. Serve hot as a side dish or over a bed of greens for a light meal.
